synthesis_text: The most common COVID‑19 symptoms are fever, cough, loss of smell and taste, and fatigue; breathing difficulties are also frequently reported [doc1_covid19.txt:chunk_00011][doc1_covid19.txt:chunk_00001].

Common COVID-19 symptoms are fever or chills, dry cough, shortness of breath, loss of taste or smell, extreme fatigue, and digestive problems such as upset stomach, vomiting, or diarrhea [doc2_covid19.txt:chunk_00002].
The most common symptoms of COVID-19 are fever, cough, and tiredness [doc3_covid19.txt:chunk_00001].
